main.description: Defines the user's presence on the Traiforce network. The public fields are readable by all ATproto users; full profile data is stored encrypted on IPFS.

displayName.description: Public-facing teaser name visible to all ATproto users.

vaultCid.description: IPFS CID pointing to the user's encrypted full profile JSON blob.

gatewayUrl.description: Address of the user's dedicated Pinata Gateway (e.g., https://alice.mypinata.cloud).
